compiled_state.title: dso-setup.sh: auto-install in detect_prerequisites -> test_prereq_missing CI failures
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Commit d10654da added an auto-install block inside detect_prerequisites() that runs 'brew install / apt-get install' unconditionally before prerequisite checks. This broke test_prereq_missing_precommit_warning and test_prereq_missing_python3_warning in CI on ubuntu-24.04 (typo 'pyrhon', wrong function, blocking behavior). Fix: remove the block from detect_prerequisites() entirely — this function should detect, not install.
